title: The UploadVR Showcase is coming June 12th - Applications Open Now!
description: The UploadVR Showcase will premiere June 12th. Apply here: https://bit.ly/4cwTg8o #uvrs #uvrss26

title: Into The Radius 2 Exits Early Access On PC & Looks To The Future
description: Into The Radius 2's PC VR full release is available now - and CM Immersive is already planning its future updates.

title: Free DIRECTV Streaming App Now Live On Quest
description: A free DIRECTV streaming app is now available on Quest headsets.

title: VR FPS Contractors Showdown: Exfil Zone Launches PvE Mode In Latest Wipe Update
description: The fourth wipe update for VR extraction shooter Contractors: Showdown ExFilZone is now live.

title: Little Nightmares VR: Altered Echoes Review - A Faithfully Terrifying Adaptation
description: Little Nightmares VR: Altered Echoes is an excellent translation of the series to VR, lacking only in more robust VR comfort options.

title: Forefront's New Map Makes It Feel More Like Battlefield VR Than Ever
description: Large-scale VR shooter Forefront launches in full tomorrow. We tried out the new Clearwater map, which makes it feel more like Battlefield VR than ever.

title: 4 Lesser-Known VR Fitness Apps That Don't Require A Subscription
description: Looking for a VR workout without a monthly fee? Hitstream, X-Fitness, Boxing Fitness, and Punch Fit are solid apps for when you just want to hit something.

title: Multiplayer Games You Can Play In VR With Friends Who Don't Own A Headset
description: Sadly, most of our friends and family don't own a VR headset. Thankfully, there are many crossplay hybrid games you can enjoy with them.

title: Marrow Marrow Hands-On: We Shoot & Scoot In This Great Roguelike Shooter
description: Marrow Marrow is a frantic VR movement shooter that succeeds because of its confident presentation, sharp audio design, and kinetic gameplay.

title: Five Nights At Freddy's: Secret Of The Mimic Adds VR Support Next Week
description: Five Nights At Freddy's: Secret of the Mimic adds VR support for PS VR2 next week with no news on other platforms.

title: Sock Puppet Superstar Is The Silliest VR Game I've Ever Seen
description: Sock Puppet Superstars is the silliest (and funniest) VR game I've ever seen.

title: Quest Update Fixes The Biggest Problem With Screenshots & Recording
description: Quest's new Capture Markers feature shows you exactly what will be in frame before you snap a screenshot or start a screen recording.

title: DIRECTV Lists Live TV Streaming App For Meta Quest Ahead Of Spring 2026 Launch
description: DIRECTV appears to be preparing a native app for Meta Quest, based on a newly discovered listing on the Quest store pointing to a planned Spring 2026 release.

title: 4v1 VR Sci-Fi Horror Game BlackGate Adds New Unlockable Alien
description: Dead By Daylight-inspired asymmetric VR sci-fi horror game BlackGate adds a new playable alien character, the Titan.

title: Can Apple Immersive Video Convey The Spirit of New York?
description: We were excited for the New York City episode of Apple Vision Pro's Elevated series, but its overstimulated creative choices leave limited room to connect with the city's spirit.

title: FlatOut 4: Total Insanity VR Delayed To May
description: FlatOut 4: Total Insanity VR has been delayed two weeks, per Flat2VR Studios.

title: Indie MR/VR Puzzle Game Squingle Arcade Opens First Public Playtest
description: The makers of Squingle Arcade are inviting players to go hands-on with their upcoming free-to-play MR/VR spatial puzzle game from April 16 through April 26.

title: Synth Riders Dua Lipa Music Pack Available Now
description: Synth Riders added Dua Lipa to its collection of officially licensed maps with seven new tracks.

title: Just One Man Impressions: Stylish & Intense Sword Action
description: Just One Man is an immersive VR hack-and-slash that puts you in the armor of a lone samurai warrior cutting his way through an endless army of enemies.

title: Psychological Horror Game Evil Inside Comes To VR In May
description: The psychological horror game Evil Inside is coming to Quest 3 headsets and PlayStation VR2 in May.

title: Meta Is Increasing The Price Of Quest 3 & Quest 3S
description: Meta is increasing the price of Quest 3 to $600 and Quest 3S to $350, citing the global memory chip crisis that has seen other tech prices rise.
